quotes.verbatim_quote:
once you have gone through this series of exercises you will have closed the gap be-

tween Modern and Standard guitar playing.
quotes.why_load_bearing: States the pedagogical goal of the entire lesson — bridging Modern and Standard guitar technique — giving the exercises their explicit raison d'être.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
In this lesson we deal with the same exercises with a moving line below the chord. This
exercise in diagram form (example 5) appears strange, but when you realize that the bot-

tom line is moving in single notes, there is no problem.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Defines the key technical concept of the chapter — a single-note moving bass line underneath a static chord — and preemptively explains why the notation looks unfamiliar.
